mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_name, doctor_name, diagnosis, treatment FROM medical_records ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, patient_name, doctor_name, diagnosis, treatment FROM medical_records WHERE patient_name = #{patientName} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, patient_name, doctor_name, diagnosis, treatment FROM medical_records WHERE doctor_name = #{doctorName} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_records (patient_name, doctor_name, diagnosis, treatment) VALUES (#{patientName}, #{doctorName}, #{diagnosis}, #{treatment})
